list.name: Changes
list.comment: Issue #19188: Move Intputs to non-compiled folders to let Idea to run test without compilation error

task.summary: Default task
Issue #11163: Enforce file size on VariableDeclarationUsageDistanceCheckSwitchExpressions
Issue #18027: Pitest Supression ant version
Issue #17269: Upgrade all scripts to newest groovy
Issue #17269: Upgrade all scripts to newest groovy
Issue #18599: Resolve error-prone violations
Issue #18599: Resolve error-prone violations
Issue #18599: Resolve error-prone violations
Issue #18673: Organize openrewrite staticanalysis composite recipes by groups as it is done on openrewrite website
Issue #18599: Resolve error-prone violations
Issue #18673: Organize openrewrite staticanalysis composite recipes by groups as it is done on openrewrite website
Issue #18673: Organize openrewrite staticanalysis composite recipes by groups as it is done on openrewrite website
Issue #18599: Disable InlineMeSuggester as Error Prone annotations are forbidden in main sources
Issue #273: Small cleanup in diff-report workflow to prepare for CLI migration
Issue #18882: Move Qodana config into config folder and update CI
Issue #18599: Resolve error-prone violations
Issue #5741: Remove test generated nonsense words from spellchecker whitelist
Issue #18999: update XdocsExamplesAstConsistencyTest to skip modules with no properties
Issue #5741: Remove test generated nonsense words from spellchecker whitelist
Issue #18999: update XdocsExamplesAstConsistencyTest to skip modules with no properties
Issue #18999: update XdocsExamplesAstConsistencyTest to skip modules with no properties

Issue #5741: Remove test generated nonsense words from spellchecker whitelist
Issue #5741: Remove test generated nonsense words from spellchecker whitelist
Issue #19154: Add format property to JavadocStyle to control allowed Javadoc comment formats
Issue #19188: Move Intputs to non-compiled folders to let Idea to run test without compilation error

MESSAGE.value: Issue #17269: Upgrade all scripts to newest groovy
Issue #18673: Organize openrewrite staticanalysis composite recipes by groups as it is done on openrewrite website
Issue #18599: Disable InlineMeSuggester as Error Prone annotations are forbidden in main sources
Issue #273: Small cleanup in diff-report workflow to prepare for CLI migration
Issue #18882: Move Qodana config into config folder and update CI
Issue #18999: update XdocsExamplesAstConsistencyTest to skip modules with no properties
Issue #5741: Remove test generated nonsense words from spellchecker whitelist
Issue #19154: Add format property to JavadocStyle to control allowed Javadoc comment formats
